summary: Packet 12 is supposed to stay UI-only, but the packet-11/11A backend still lacks setup-side preflight transport and a reconnection-safe worker snapshot, so another backend repair packet is required before the SPA can land cleanly.
notes: Trackers were updated to insert repair packet 11B immediately after packet 11A, and audits/drift_audit_state.json was updated to record this cumulative audit.
